EVSE Pro 使用功能说明书EVSE Pro User Manual

功能导向的使用手册：讲「怎么用」。文中「」内文字均为 App 界面真实文案，可直接对照查找。

A feature-oriented manual: it explains how to use the app. Text in quotes matches the app's actual on-screen wording.

本说明书每个功能怎么用、有什么前提
帮助中心出了问题怎么排查 · App 内「我的」
销售手册为什么选 EVSE Pro · 内部资料
This manualHow each feature works and what it requires
Help centerTroubleshooting · in app under "Me"
Sales handbookWhy EVSE Pro · internal

图例：操作前提标注Legend: operation prerequisites

操作是否可用取决于四个独立维度，全篇用统一徽标标注，未标注即无限制。

Availability depends on four independent dimensions, marked with unified badges throughout. No badge = no restriction.

近场必须人在充电桩旁，蓝牙近场执行；远程会提示「靠近后重试」
远程可用蓝牙近场与云端远程均可执行
需登录未登录时点击会先弹出登录
仅物主共享用户没有此入口
视型号仅特定型号能力显示（带屏、负载均衡、联网等）
NearbyRequires standing next to the charger (Bluetooth); remote attempts say "Move closer and try again"
Remote OKWorks over both Bluetooth (nearby) and Cloud (remote)
Sign-inTapping while signed out opens sign-in first
OwnerShared users don't see this entry
ModelOnly on models with the capability (screen, load balancing, connectivity, …)

蓝牙近场：手机在充电桩附近时直连；云端远程：不在附近时，通过充电桩的家庭 Wi-Fi 联网中转。两条控制通道切换全自动。

在线：两条通道任一可达即在线——人在桩旁蓝牙能连上，即使桩未联网也显示「在线」。

Bluetooth (nearby): direct connection when your phone is close to the charger. Cloud (remote): relayed through the charger's home Wi-Fi when you're away. Switching between the two channels is fully automatic.

Online: the device is online if either channel is reachable — next to the charger with Bluetooth connectable, it shows "Online" even without internet.

第 1 章Chapter 1

认识 EVSE ProGetting to know EVSE Pro

主界面：三个底部标签Main interface: three bottom tabs

标签内容
首页所有设备的总览网格；添加设备与进入设备控制页的入口；右上角铃铛进消息中心
场景充电自动化（当前版本为功能预告，见 §3.4）
我的账号、电价、车辆能耗、设备分享、语言、外观、帮助中心、反馈、关于
TabContents
HomeGrid overview of all devices; add devices; enter device control; the bell opens the message center
ScenesCharging automation (a preview in this release, see §3.4)
MeAccount, electricity rate, vehicle efficiency, device sharing, language, appearance, help center, feedback, about

设备页：四个功能标签Device page: four tabs

从首页点击充电桩卡片进入设备页（全屏打开，左上角「‹」整体收起返回首页）：

Tap a charger card on Home to open its device page (full-screen; "‹" top-left collapses back to Home):

标签内容谁可见
状态实时控制（默认落点）· 分相详情 · 能耗与负载均衡 视型号所有人
计划预约充电（一次性 / 循环）仅物主
记录充电记录、图表、导出所有人
设置设备配置、固件升级、解绑所有人（内容按身份收窄）
TabContentsWho sees it
StatusLive control (default) · per-phase detail · energy & load balancing ModelEveryone
ScheduleScheduled charging (one-time / recurring)Owner
HistoryCharging sessions, charts, exportEveryone
SettingsDevice configuration, firmware update, unpairingEveryone (contents narrowed by role)
共享用户看到的是 3 个标签的精简设备页（无「计划」），设置页内容也更少，详见 §9.3。
Shared users get a trimmed 3-tab device page (no "Schedule") and a reduced Settings page — see §9.3.

两条控制通道Two control channels

  • 人在桩旁走蓝牙近场——配对、控制、固件升级都不依赖家庭网络；
  • 不在桩旁且设备已配网绑定账号，自动走云端远程；手机蓝牙关闭时也自动切云端，操作照常可用；
  • 少数操作是近场专属（屏幕亮度、温度单位、启动方式、负载均衡配置、固件升级、解绑），全篇以 近场 标注。
  • Next to the charger: Bluetooth (nearby) — pairing, control and firmware updates work without home internet;
  • Away: Cloud (remote), if the device has Wi-Fi configured and is bound to your account; with the phone's Bluetooth off, the app switches to cloud automatically;
  • A few operations are Bluetooth-only (screen brightness, temperature unit, start method, load-balancing configuration, firmware update, unpairing) — marked Nearby throughout.

第 2 章Chapter 2

快速上手Quick start

首次启动引导First-launch onboarding

首次打开 App 展示 4 页功能引导，可随时「跳过」；结束页点「进入应用」即到首页。引导只自动出现一次。

The first launch shows a 4-page feature intro; "Skip" anytime and tap "Enter App" on the final page. It only appears automatically once.

账号（可以后置）Account (can wait)

不登录也能用：添加设备、近场控制、充电记录、电价设置均不要求登录。登录后解锁：云端远程控制、设备分享、消息中心、意见反馈。建议在配网步骤前完成登录（配网发送时会自动弹出登录）。

Works without signing in: adding devices, nearby control, charging history and electricity rates. Signing in unlocks cloud remote control, device sharing, the message center and feedback. Signing in before the Wi-Fi step is recommended (the app prompts automatically when needed).

添加充电桩（约 2 分钟）Add a charger (about 2 minutes)

首页点「添加设备」或右上角「+」：

On Home tap "Add a device" or "+":

  1. 选择方式——「通过蓝牙配对」（推荐）或「扫描二维码」。页面同时说明所需的蓝牙 / 相机 / 通知权限。
  2. （可选）扫描二维码——贴纸通常位于充电桩右侧、电缆口附近；扫不出可「手动输入设备 ID」或直接走蓝牙配对。
  3. 正在查找设备 近场——确认充电桩已通电并进入配对模式（长按 3 秒按钮），从列表点选目标设备发起认领。
  4. 连接到 WiFi 需登录（仅联网机型出现）——输入家庭 Wi-Fi 名与密码点「连接」。设备仅支持 2.4 GHz WiFi 网络，疑似 5 GHz 网络名会出现警示。也可「跳过 — 仅使用蓝牙」，之后仅能近场使用（可随时在设备设置 → WiFi 补配）。
  5. 命名设备——预填蓝牙广播名，可改为「车库」「车道」等建议名或自定义。
  6. 全部就绪——显示设备摘要；已配网并登录时展示「充电桩正在上线…」→「充电桩已上线」激活进度。点「打开 <设备名>」直接进入控制页。
  1. Choose a method — "Pair via Bluetooth" (recommended) or "Scan QR code". The page also explains the Bluetooth / camera / notification permissions.
  2. (Optional) Scan QR code — the sticker is usually on the right side of the charger near the cable gland; if it won't scan, enter the device ID manually or just use Bluetooth pairing.
  3. Looking for devices Nearby — "Make sure your device is powered on and in pairing mode (hold the button for 3 seconds)." Pick your charger from the live list.
  4. Connect to WiFi Sign-in (connected models only) — enter your home Wi-Fi name and password, tap "Connect". "This device only supports 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi networks." A warning appears for names that look like 5 GHz. You can also "Skip — use Bluetooth only" (reconfigure later in device Settings → WiFi).
  5. Name the device — pre-filled with the Bluetooth broadcast name; pick a suggestion ("Garage", "Driveway", …) or type your own.
  6. All set — shows the device summary; if signed in with Wi-Fi configured, activation runs "Your charger is coming online…" → "Your charger is online". Tap "Open <device name>" to jump straight in.

第一次充电First charge

  1. 将充电枪插入充电桩（界面从「未连接充电枪」变为「就绪」）。
  2. 需要的话拖动「电流上限」滑杆调整限流。
  3. 点「开始充电」；充电中随时可点按或右滑「停止充电」。
  1. Plug the cable into the charger (the screen goes from "NO CABLE CONNECTED" to "READY").
  2. Optionally drag the "Current limit" slider.
  3. Tap "Start charging"; while charging, tap or slide "Stop charging" anytime.

遇到问题？帮助中心「配对与绑定」：扫描不到设备 · 提示「已被认领」 · 一直「正在上线」 · Wi-Fi 配置失败

Problems? Help center "Pairing & Binding": can't find the charger · "already paired to an owner" · stuck "coming online" · Wi-Fi setup failed

第 3 章Chapter 3

首页与多设备Home & multiple devices

设备网格Device grid

顶部显示「我的设备」与「N 在线 / N 离线」计数。每张设备卡：设备名（自定义名优先）与位置/型号副标题、状态胶囊（「在线」绿 / 「离线」灰 / 「共享」蓝）、通道图标（蓝牙恒显，云图标 = 可远程控制）、该型号的产品渲染图。

The header shows "My devices" with online/offline counts. Each card: device name (your custom name first) with location/model subtitle, status pill ("Online" green / "Offline" gray / "Shared" blue), channel icons (Bluetooth always, cloud icon = remote-controllable), and the model's product render.

人就在设备旁且蓝牙可连时，卡片直接显示「在线」，与是否联网无关。

Next to the device with Bluetooth connectable, the card shows "Online" regardless of internet.

当前版本仅充电桩类型的卡片可点开控制页；家庭储能等其他类型为预留展示。
In this release only charger cards open a control page; home-battery and other types are placeholders.

设备卡片点开后What happens when you tap a card

  • 常规设备 → 直接进入设备页；
  • 换了手机、本机无蓝牙配对凭证 → App 自动尝试恢复近场控制能力，不在场时回落云端远程；
  • 设备从未完成联网激活且本机无凭证 → 提示「设备尚未上线」，请先完成 Wi-Fi 配网并等待激活。
  • Regular device → opens the device page;
  • New phone without local pairing credentials → the app recovers nearby control automatically, falling back to Cloud (remote) when away;
  • Never activated online and no local credentials → "Device not online yet — finish Wi-Fi setup and wait for it to activate."

标签与分组Tabs & groups

首页筛选行按自定义标签过滤设备。点筛选行右侧齿轮进入「标签与分组」：开关某标签是否显示、长按拖拽或「···」菜单调序、左滑删除；「全部」恒在第一位不可编辑。「新建标签」：名称最多 6 字 + 5 种图标 + 可勾选设备分配。

The Home filter row filters devices by custom tags. Tap the gear for "Tabs & groups": toggle a tab's visibility, reorder by long-press drag or the "···" menu, swipe left to delete; "All" is always first and not editable. "Create tab": name up to 6 characters + 5 icon styles + optional device assignment.

分享给我的设备不参与自定义分组，只出现在「全部」网格中。
Devices shared to you don't participate in custom groups; they appear under "All" only.

「场景」标签（预告）The "Scenes" tab (preview)

底部第二个标签「场景」当前展示「让充电自动化」介绍页；点「创建场景」会提示「即将上线」，功能将在后续版本开放。

The second bottom tab "Scenes" currently shows an intro — "Automate your charging" — and "Create scene" responds with "Coming soon". The feature ships in a later release.

第 4 章Chapter 4

日常充电控制Everyday charging control

设备页 → 状态标签 → 「实时」分段。界面随充电桩真实状态自动切换：

Device page → Status tab → "Now" segment. The screen follows the charger's real state:

七种状态一览The seven states

状态标题何时出现可执行操作
「未连接充电枪」空闲未插枪无（提示插枪）
「就绪」已插枪、车辆已识别调电流上限 · 「开始充电」远程可用
充电中充电进行中调电流上限 · 「停止充电」（点按或右滑）
「等待中」已预约、未到起充时间「停止充电」取消本次等待
「充电已被充电桩暂停」桩侧保护动作或按预约暂停「恢复充电」
「车辆已暂停」车辆自身要求停止（多为已达车端目标电量）「停止充电」结束会话
「已完成」本次充电正常结束「再次充电」
State titleWhenActions
"NO CABLE CONNECTED"Idle, no cableNone (plug-in prompt)
"READY"Cable in, vehicle detectedCurrent limit · "Start charging" Remote OK
ChargingCharging in progressCurrent limit · "Stop charging" (tap or slide)
"WAITING"Scheduled, before start time"Stop charging" cancels the wait
"Charging paused by the charger"Charger-side protection or schedule pause"Resume"
"VEHICLE PAUSED"The vehicle requested the stop (usually reached its own target)"Stop charging" ends the session
"COMPLETE"Session finished normally"Charge Again"

充电中界面While charging

  • 中心圆形功率表盘按当前功率 / 额定功率显示进度弧；
  • 六项实时指标：电压 / 电流 / 功率 / 能量 / 时长 / 温度（无数据显示「—」）；
  • 充电时长为「累计充电净时长」——暂停不计时；
  • The central power gauge shows current power against rated power;
  • Six live metrics: Voltage / Current / Power / Energy / Duration / Temp ("—" when unavailable);
  • Duration counts net charging time — pauses don't count;

电流上限Current limit

「就绪」与充电中均可拖动「电流上限」滑杆（最小 6 A，最大为该型号额定电流），松手即下发。被设备拒绝时滑杆自动弹回原值并提示原因。

In "READY" and while charging, drag the "Current limit" slider (min 6 A, max = the model's rated current); releasing sends the command. If rejected, the slider springs back and explains why.

「已完成」页The "COMPLETE" screen

展示本次会话汇总：充入电量、费用（按你的电价方案估算）、减排 CO₂、起止时刻与总时长；光伏机型 视型号 另显示光伏 / 电网来源构成。

Session summary: energy delivered, cost (estimated from your rate plan), CO₂ avoided, start/end times and total duration; solar models Model also show a solar/grid source breakdown.

连接状态提示Connection overlays

提示含义与操作
「正在连接…」正在建立链路或等待首帧数据，稍候即可
「设备离线」两条通道均不可达，自动重试中；可「重试」/「停止重试」。检测到手机蓝牙关闭时会提示先开蓝牙
「连接到的不是这台设备」点「重新查找」定位正确的充电桩
「连接失败」点「重试」
OverlayMeaning / action
"Connecting…"Establishing the link or waiting for first data — just wait
"Device offline"Neither channel reachable, auto-retrying; "Retry" / "Stop retrying". If the phone's Bluetooth is off you'll be prompted to enable it
Wrong charger connected"Search again" to find the right one
"Connection failed"Tap "Retry"

命令被拒或无法确认Rejected or unconfirmed commands

  • 「请插枪或确认车辆已就绪，然后重试。」——车未就绪；
  • 「充电桩当前离线，无法执行该命令。」——先检查供电与家庭网络；
  • 「无法通过蓝牙连接到充电桩。请靠近后重试。」——该操作近场专属或蓝牙暂不可达；
  • 「未能确认命令是否生效。请重试。」——这不代表操作失败，仅是确认超时，设备响应后界面自动更新；
  • 「访问凭证已过期」/「访问已失效」——见 §9.4；
  • 「设备已解除配对」——桩被解绑或恢复出厂，按弹窗「移除设备」一键清理后重新配对。
  • "Plug in the connector or make sure the vehicle is ready, then try again." — vehicle not ready;
  • "The charger is offline right now, so it can't run this command." — check power and home network;
  • "Couldn't reach the charger over Bluetooth. Move closer and try again." — Bluetooth-only operation or Bluetooth temporarily unreachable;
  • "We couldn't confirm whether the command went through. Please try again." — not a failure, just a confirmation timeout; the screen updates once the device responds;
  • "Access credentials outdated" / "Access removed" — see §9.4;
  • Device unpaired (factory reset / unbound elsewhere) — follow the "Remove device" prompt, then pair again.

遇到问题？帮助中心「充电控制」「连接与离线」：无法开始充电 · 充电自己停了 · 电流调不到更高 · 功率和预想不一样

Problems? Help center "Charging Control" & "Connection & Offline": can't start charging · charging stopped by itself · current won't go higher · power differs from expectations

第 5 章Chapter 5

预约充电Scheduled charging

设备页 → 「计划」标签　Device page → "Schedule" tab　需登录Sign-in 仅物主Owner 远程可用Remote OK

两种模式（互斥）Two modes (mutually exclusive)

充电桩只有一个计划槽：开启「一次性」会自动关闭「循环」，反之亦然。

The charger has a single schedule slot: enabling "One-time" disables "Recurring" and vice versa.

模式设置项行为
一次性未来某个具体日期 + 时刻到点自动开始一次充电
循环每周星期几（可多选）+ 统一起充时刻每逢选中日到点自动开始
ModeYou setBehavior
One-timeA specific future date + timeStarts one charge at that moment
RecurringWeekdays (multi-select) + one shared start timeStarts automatically on each selected day

操作方式How to use

  1. 在对应分段设置时间（开关开启后设置项锁定变灰，需先关闭开关才能修改）；
  2. 打开「启用计划」/「循环计划」开关——此刻才把计划下发到充电桩；
  3. 成功提示「已设置预约充电」；被拒会自动回退开关并提示原因（如「起充时间已过，请重新选择一个未来的时刻」「请至少选择一个充电日」）。
  1. Set the time in the segment (once the switch is on, editing locks — turn it off first to change);
  2. Turn on "Enable schedule" / "Recurring schedule" — this is when the plan is sent to the charger;
  3. Success shows "Schedule set"; rejections roll the switch back with a reason ("Start time has passed — please pick a time in the future", "Select at least one day").
预约到点由充电桩自主开始（桩内时钟驱动），App 关闭、手机不在家也照常执行。预约只控制开始时刻，结束由车辆充满或手动停止决定。到点前设备显示「等待中」，可随时「停止充电」取消本次等待。
The start is driven by the charger's own clock — it fires even with the app closed or your phone away. A schedule controls only the start; the end comes from the vehicle or a manual stop. Before the start time the device shows "WAITING"; "Stop charging" cancels the wait.

循环模式所有选中日共享同一起充时刻，不支持按天设不同时间。

Recurring mode shares one start time across all selected days.

第 6 章Chapter 6

电价与成本Electricity rates & cost

入口：「我的 → 电价 / 车辆能耗」，或设备记录页的「充电电价 / 充电续航」设置卡。这是全局本地配置：无需登录、无需联网、不分设备，所有充电桩共用一份。

Entry: "Me → Electricity rate / Vehicle efficiency", or the setup cards on the device History page. Global local configuration: no sign-in, no internet, shared across all chargers.

电价方案Rate plan

按「工作日 / 周六 / 周日」三种日型分别设置多档分时电价：

Per day type (Weekdays / Saturday / Sunday), define multiple time-of-use tiers:

  • 每档 = 名称 + 单价 + 颜色 + 一到多段生效时间窗；「今日电价概览」卡实时显示单价、24 小时价格曲线与时段摘要；
  • 「添加档位」新建；点击已有档位进入编辑（可「删除此档位」）；
  • 周六 / 周日可「从工作日导入」一键复制；「清空当前档位」清空当前日型（均有二次确认）；
  • 时间窗不允许重叠——保存时自动校验，冲突窗口红色高亮并拦截；
  • 货币符号跟随系统语言与地区自动决定。
  • Each tier = name + price + color + one or more time windows; a live overview card shows prices, a 24-hour price curve and window summaries;
  • "Add tier" creates; tapping a tier opens the editor ("Delete tier" available);
  • Saturday/Sunday can "Import from weekdays"; "Clear all tiers" empties the current day type (both confirm first);
  • Time windows must not overlap — validation highlights conflicts in red and blocks saving;
  • The currency symbol follows the system language and region.

设置后，充电记录与「已完成」页即可显示每次充电的费用估算；已计入历史记录的成本不会因日后改价而重算。

Once set, History and the "COMPLETE" screen show per-session cost estimates; recorded costs are never recalculated after a price change.

车辆能耗Vehicle efficiency

设置车辆百公里电耗（8–25 kWh/100km 滑杆，默认 17），用于把充入电量换算成可行驶里程与碳排对比。换算里程与减排均为估算值。

Set your vehicle's consumption (8–25 kWh/100km slider, default 17) to convert energy into estimated range and CO₂ comparisons. Range and CO₂ figures are estimates.

第 7 章Chapter 7

充电记录Charging history

设备页 → 「记录」标签。数据存储在本机，设备离线也能查看；物主与共享用户均可用，无需登录。

Device page → "History" tab. Data lives on this phone — viewable while the device is offline; owners and shared users alike, no sign-in.

记录主页History home

  • 最近充电统计：能量 / 续航 / 减碳三宫格 + 今天 / 本月汇总（从未充电时显示「充电电价」「充电续航」两张设置引导卡）；
  • 图表：周 / 月 / 年三档切换的充电量柱状图；
  • 最近记录：最新 3 条，点击查看详情；
  • 「分享」把本页渲染成长图；「导出完整历史（CSV）」批量导出。
  • Latest charge stats: energy / range / CO₂ trio + today/this-month summaries (before the first charge: "Charging fee" and "Charging range" setup cards);
  • Chart: weekly / monthly / yearly energy bars;
  • Recent sessions: latest 3, tap for detail;
  • "Share" renders the page as an image; "Export full history (CSV)" for bulk export.

全部记录All sessions

「查看全部」进入按月分组的完整列表：分组头显示「N 次 · X kWh · ¥Y」汇总；右上角日历图标按「近 7 天 / 近 30 天 / 今年」等预设或自定义起止日期筛选；底部可导出 CSV。

"View all" opens the month-grouped list: headers summarize count · kWh · cost; the calendar icon filters by presets ("Last 7 days", "Last 30 days", "This year", …) or a custom range; "Export All Sessions (CSV)" at the bottom.

充电详情Session detail

单次会话完整信息：状态（已完成 / 充电中 / 已中止）、能量、成本、较峰价节省、开启充电方式、停止方式、峰值温度、减碳；光伏机型另有光伏 / 电网占比。「下载回执（PDF）」生成单次充电回执；「分享」生成本页长图。

Everything about one session: status (Completed / Charging / Stopped), energy, cost, "Saved vs peak", start method, stop reason, peak temperature, CO₂; solar models add a solar/grid split. "Download receipt (PDF)" generates a single-session receipt; "Share" renders the page as an image.

记录中无法获取的数据一律显示「—」，不会编造 0 值。停止方式各简标的含义详见帮助中心「充电停止原因对照表」。
Missing data shows "—" — never a fabricated 0. Stop-reason labels are explained in Help center "Stop-Reason Reference".

第 8 章Chapter 8

能耗与负载均衡Energy & load balancing

设备页 → 状态标签 → 「能耗」分段　Device page → Status tab → "Energy" segment　视型号Model（仅支持动态负载均衡 DLB 的型号显示） (only on models with dynamic load balancing, DLB)

实时能量流（只读，所有人可见）Live energy flow (read-only, everyone)

太阳能 / 市电 / 家庭 / 充电桩四节点间的实时能量流动画。充电桩节点显示实时功率；市电与太阳能节点的进线电流读数需加装电流互感器并开启负载均衡后才有真值，否则显示「—」。

Animated flow between solar / grid / home / charger nodes. The charger node shows live power; grid and solar current readings require a CT clamp and load balancing enabled — otherwise "—".

负载均衡配置　Load balancing configuration　仅物主Owner 近场Nearby

  • 「动态负载均衡」总开关；「模式」四选一：标准 / 纯光伏 / 电网限制 / 混合（后两者仅光伏机型出现）；
  • 开启后出现三个滑杆：入户上限（6–100 A，充电桩允许使用的最大电流）、进线总限流（0–100 A，0 = 不限）、最低充电电流（6 A 起，保底电流）；
  • 「充电电流」行实时显示当前实际电流及约束原因（如「受家庭用电限制」「跟踪光伏余电」「已达设定上限」）。
  • "Dynamic load balancing" master switch; "Mode": Standard / Pure solar / Grid restriction / Hybrid (the latter two on solar models only);
  • With DLB on, three sliders appear: Max into house (6–100 A), Grid limit (0–100 A, 0 = unlimited), Min charging current (from 6 A);
  • "Charging current" shows the live value plus the active constraint ("Limited by household load", "Tracking solar surplus", "At configured limit", …).
负载均衡配置为蓝牙近场专属——不在桩旁操作会直接提示「无法通过蓝牙连接到充电桩。请靠近后重试。」
Load-balancing configuration is Bluetooth-only — away from the charger it fails immediately with "Couldn't reach the charger over Bluetooth. Move closer and try again."

第 9 章Chapter 9

设备分享Device sharing

把充电桩分享给家人，各自用自己的手机控制。两种方式：

Share a charger with family; everyone controls it from their own phone. Two ways:

方式适用有效期撤销
在线分享已联网绑定云端的桩7 / 30 / 90 天物主在分享管理随时撤销
近场分享码任何桩（含未联网）1 小时 / 24 小时 / 7 天 / 30 天到期自动失效；对方可自行移除
MethodWorks forValidityRevocation
Online shareCloud-bound (connected) chargers7 / 30 / 90 daysOwner revokes anytime in share management
Nearby share codeAny charger (incl. offline-only)1 h / 24 h / 7 d / 30 dExpires automatically; recipient can remove it locally

物主视角：发起分享　Owner: initiating　需登录Sign-in 仅物主Owner

入口：设备页 → 设置 → 「分享给他人」→ 分享管理页。

Entry: device page → Settings → "Share with others".

在线分享：让对方打开「我的 → 设备分享」出示邀请码 → 你点「扫描邀请码」扫对方屏幕 → 选有效期 → 完成，提示「已分享充电桩」。每台设备最多 10 个在线分享；成员列表中可随时「撤销」。

Online share: the recipient opens "Me → Device sharing" to show their invite code → you tap "Scan invite code" → pick a validity → done ("Charger shared"). Up to 10 active online shares per device; "Revoke" any member from the list.

近场分享码 近场：人在桩旁蓝牙已连接时点「近场分享码」→ 选有效期 → 生成二维码，对方扫描或复制码文本导入。此码不经过云端、不进成员列表、无法单独撤销。

Nearby share code Nearby: next to the charger with Bluetooth connected, tap "Nearby share code" → pick a validity → a QR code is generated for the recipient to scan or paste. It never touches the cloud, doesn't appear in the member list and can't be revoked individually.

分享码即钥匙：任何持码人都可在桩附近控制，请像实体钥匙一样保管。
"A share code is a key: anyone holding it can control the charger nearby. Guard it like a physical key."

共享用户视角：接受分享Recipient: accepting

  • 在线分享：登录后打开「我的 → 设备分享」，出示自己的邀请码给物主扫描，设备自动出现在首页；
  • 近场分享码：在「设备分享」页点「导入近场分享码」，扫码或「粘贴分享码」，成功提示「已导入分享，可在首页查看该设备」。
  • Online share: sign in, open "Me → Device sharing", show your invite code to the owner — the device then appears on your Home;
  • Nearby share code: on the same page tap "Import nearby share code", scan or "Paste share code" — "Share imported — find it on Home".

共享用户能做什么What shared users can do

功能共享用户
开始 / 停止充电、调电流上限可用
实时状态、分相详情、能量流查看可用
充电记录、导出可用
「关于此充电桩」信息页可用
「近场连接」手动触发蓝牙直连（在线分享）可用
「移除此分享设备」（只影响本机）可用
预约充电（计划标签）标签不显示
负载均衡配置、屏幕亮度、启动方式、Wi-Fi 配网不可用
固件升级、分享给他人、解绑设备不可用
FeatureShared user
Start / stop charging, current limitAvailable
Live status, per-phase detail, energy flowAvailable
Charging history, exportAvailable
"About this charger"Available
"Nearby connection" (manual Bluetooth connect, online shares)Available
"Remove this shared device" (this phone only)Available
Scheduled charging (Schedule tab)Tab hidden
Load balancing, brightness, start method, Wi-Fi setupNot available
Firmware update, sharing onward, unpairingNot available

首页上共享设备的卡片带蓝色「共享」标识；近场分享码导入的设备因不经云端，不显示实时在线状态。

Shared devices carry a blue "Shared" pill on Home; devices imported via nearby share code don't show live online status (they bypass the cloud).

权限变化时的提示When access changes

  • 「访问已失效」：分享被撤销或已过期，确认后自动退出设备页；需要继续使用请让物主重新分享。
  • 「访问凭证已过期」：设备绑定信息更新过（如物主撤销过其他分享），点「刷新凭证」即可自愈，成功提示「凭证已更新，请重试操作」。物主与共享用户都可能遇到。
  • "Access removed": the share was revoked or expired; confirming exits the device page. Ask the owner to share again.
  • "Access credentials outdated": the device's binding changed (e.g. the owner revoked another share); tap "Refresh credentials" — "Credentials updated — please retry". Owners and shared users can both encounter this.

第 10 章Chapter 10

消息中心Message center

入口：首页右上角铃铛（有未读时带红点）　Entry: bell icon top-right on Home (red dot = unread)　需登录Sign-in

  • 汇总账号下所有充电桩的通知：充电事件、告警、授权、固件更新等；
  • 卡片配色即分类：绿 = 充电事件，红 = 严重告警，琥珀 = 警告 / 授权，蓝 = 固件，灰 = 一般通知；告警恢复后收到带「已恢复：」前缀的通知；
  • 点击单条标为已读；「全部已读」一键清空未读；顶部「全部 / 昨天 / 更早」按时间筛选；下拉刷新拉取离线期间的云端缓冲消息；
  • 页内「推送通知」引导条可一键开启系统推送授权。
  • Aggregates notifications from all chargers on the account: charging events, alarms, authorization, firmware;
  • Card color = category: green = charging, red = critical alarm, amber = warning/authorization, blue = firmware, gray = other; recovery arrives with a "Resolved:" prefix;
  • Tap to mark one read; "Mark all read"; "ALL / YESTERDAY / OLDER" time filter; pull to refresh fetches cloud-buffered messages;
  • The "Push notifications" banner enables system push in one tap.
消息不可删除；点击消息不会跳转到设备页。10 类告警的含义与处理方法见帮助中心「告警说明」。
Messages can't be deleted, and tapping one doesn't navigate to the device. The 10 alarm types are explained in Help center "Alarms".

第 11 章Chapter 11

设备设置与维护Device settings & maintenance

设备页 → 「设置」标签。顶部设备卡显示设备名、在线状态与序列号。

Device page → "Settings" tab. The header card shows the device name, online status and serial number.

设置项一览（物主视角）Settings at a glance (owner view)

设置项前提说明
顶部设备卡（改名）—点击进入改名，支持「车库」等建议标签
通道偏好视型号「自动 / 仅本地蓝牙 / 仅云端」，下次进入该设备时生效
WiFi需登录 近场重新配网 / 更换家庭 Wi-Fi，成功后回显新网络名
分享给他人需登录 仅物主进入分享管理（第 9 章）
最大电流只读型号规格，无编辑入口
屏幕亮度 + 自动调节近场 视型号仅带屏机型；拖动实时预览，松手下发
温度单位 ℃/℉近场同时决定 App 内该设备的温度显示
即插即充近场开：插枪即充；关：显示「如何开始充电」入口
如何开始充电近场 仅物主当前提供「按钮启动」（单击桩上按钮启动，无需验证）
版本（固件更新）需登录 仅物主 近场 视型号有更新时挂绿色「更新」角标
关于此充电桩—见下文
解绑此设备仅物主 近场见下文
ItemRequiresNotes
Header card (rename)—Reuses the naming page with suggestions
Channel preferenceModel"Auto / Local only (BLE) / Cloud only" — "Applies next time you open this device"
WiFiSign-in NearbyReconfigure / change home Wi-Fi; shows the new SSID on success
Share with othersSign-in OwnerOpens share management (Ch. 9)
Max currentread-onlyModel specification
LCD brightness + Auto-adjustNearby ModelScreen models only; live preview while dragging
Temperature unit ℃/℉NearbyAlso drives the app's temperature display for this device
Plug & ChargeNearbyOn: charging starts on plug-in; off: reveals "How to start charging"
How to start chargingNearby OwnerCurrently offers "Button start" (single press, no verification)
Version (firmware update)Sign-in Owner Nearby ModelGreen "Update" badge when available
About this charger—See below
Unpair this deviceOwner NearbySee below
屏幕亮度、温度单位、启动方式为蓝牙近场专属设置，远程修改会提示「靠近后重试」。
Screen brightness, temperature unit and start method are Bluetooth-only; remote attempts get "Move closer and try again".

关于此充电桩About this charger

只读信息页：产品渲染图、型号、品牌、序列号（双击可复制）、最大功率、最大电流、相数、当前固件版本。物主与共享用户均可查看。

Read-only: product render, model, brand, serial number (double-tap to copy), max power, max current, phases, current firmware version. Owners and shared users alike.

固件升级Firmware update

全程需保持蓝牙近场连接并停留在本页。流程：检查更新 → 「当前 X → 升级到 Y • N MB」→ 「立即更新」→ 正在下载… → 正在传输到充电桩… → 正在安装… → 正在完成…（桩自动重启）→ 更新完成。

Stay on the page with Bluetooth connected throughout. Flow: check → "current X → Y • N MB" → "Update now" → "Downloading…" → "Transferring to charger…" → "Installing…" → "Finishing up…" (charger reboots) → "Update complete".

  • 升级期间 App 自动阻止锁屏与返回手势；中途返回会弹「离开将中止更新？」确认；
  • 桩安装时自动重启属正常现象，App 会持续确认新版本（最长约 5 分钟）；若提示「下拉刷新以确认新版本」，稍后回本页复查即可；
  • 失败按原因提示（存储空间不足 / 固件校验失败 / 设备更新超时等），点「重试」；反复失败可断电重启充电桩后再试；
  • 蓝牙未连接时本页显示「暂不可更新」，请靠近充电桩。
  • The app blocks auto-lock and the back gesture during transfer; leaving prompts a confirmation;
  • The install-time reboot is normal; the app keeps confirming the new version (up to ~5 min); if told to pull-to-refresh later, revisit the page to verify;
  • Failures show a reason (insufficient storage / verification failed / timeout …) with "Retry"; if it keeps failing, power-cycle the charger and retry;
  • Without Bluetooth the page shows "Update unavailable — Connect to your charger over Bluetooth to update its firmware."

解绑设备Unpairing

设置页底部「解绑此设备」→ 二次确认 → App 向桩发送解绑指令并解除云端绑定 → 设备从首页移除。

Settings bottom → "Unpair this device" → confirm → the app sends the unbind command and releases the cloud binding → the device leaves Home.

  • 解绑清除该设备在 App 内的充电记录、预约计划、Wi-Fi 名称、连接偏好、显示与启动方式设置——设备转让后新主人看不到你的任何使用痕迹；
  • 解绑需要能连上设备（近场蓝牙优先），不在桩旁会失败并提示到充电桩附近重试；
  • 多次失败后提供「强制移除」逃生选项：仅清除本机与账号记录，桩侧配对信息不会清除（对话框会如实说明）；
  • 共享用户对应的是「移除此分享设备」：只从本机移除，不影响物主侧的分享记录。
  • Unpairing clears this device's history, schedules, Wi-Fi name, connection preference, display and start-method settings from the app — after handover, the new owner sees none of your usage;
  • It requires reaching the device (Bluetooth preferred); away from the charger it fails with a prompt to retry nearby;
  • After repeated failures a "Force remove" escape hatch appears: clears only this phone and account records — the charger keeps its pairing info (the dialog says so honestly);
  • Shared users get "Remove this shared device" instead: local removal only.
iOS 重新绑定特别说明：解绑后若要把这台充电桩重新绑定到 iPhone，请先到系统「设置 → 蓝牙」，点击该充电桩（名称形如 EVSE-XXXXXX）旁的 ⓘ 并选择「忽略此设备」，再回 App 重新配对。系统里残留的旧蓝牙配对不会随解绑自动清除，不忽略会导致重新配对反复连接失败。
iOS re-pairing note: to bind this charger to an iPhone again after unpairing, first open iOS Settings → Bluetooth, tap ⓘ next to the charger (named like EVSE-XXXXXX) and choose Forget This Device, then pair again in the app. iOS keeps the old Bluetooth pairing after the unbind; without forgetting it, re-pairing keeps failing to connect.
换手机：旧手机上先解绑、新手机重新配对是最干净的路径；旧手机不可用时，新手机登录同一账号后打开设备卡片，App 会自动恢复控制能力（要求该设备完成过联网激活）。
Switching phones: unpair on the old phone, then pair on the new one. If the old phone is gone, sign in on the new phone and open the device card — the app restores control automatically (requires the device to have activated online at least once).

第 12 章Chapter 12

账号与个性化Account & personalization

登录与注册Sign-in & registration

  • 邮箱注册：姓名 + 邮箱 + 6 位邮箱验证码 + 密码（至少 8 位，有强度提示）+ 同意服务条款与隐私政策；
  • 邮箱登录：邮箱 + 密码；Apple 登录：登录页「使用 Apple 登录」一键完成；
  • 忘记密码：输入邮箱 → 「发送重置链接」→ 到邮件里完成重置（链接有效期 30 分钟，注意垃圾邮件文件夹）。App 内不提供旧密码改新密码的表单。
  • Email registration: name + email + 6-digit email code + password (min 8, strength meter) + Terms of Service and Privacy Policy consent;
  • Email sign-in: email + password; Sign in with Apple: one tap on the sign-in page;
  • Forgot password: enter the email → "Send reset link" → finish in the email (link valid 30 minutes; check spam). The app has no old-password → new-password form.

编辑资料（「我的」→ 点击头像卡）　Edit profile ("Me" → avatar card)　需登录Sign-in

  • 昵称（最多 20 字）与头像（预设色 / 拍照 / 相册 / 恢复默认）——仅保存在本机；
  • 「重置密码」：自动预填当前邮箱，发送重置链接；
  • 「退出登录」：二次确认后登出，可随时重新登录；
  • 「删除账号」：长按 1.2 秒触发。名下还有绑定设备时会被阻止（「请先解绑后再删除账号」）；确认后账号及全部充电数据永久删除、无法恢复。
  • Nickname (max 20 chars) and avatar (presets / camera / library / reset) — stored on this phone only;
  • "Reset password": pre-fills your email, sends the reset link;
  • "Sign out": confirm to sign out; sign back in anytime;
  • "Delete account": hold for 1.2 s. Blocked while devices are still bound (unbind first); once confirmed, the account and all charging data are permanently deleted.

语言与外观Language & appearance

语言：8 种即点即切，无需重启——English、Français、Deutsch、Español、Italiano、עברית、Polski、简体中文（希伯来语自动切换从右到左排版）。外观：跟随系统 / 浅色 / 深色，全局即时生效。

Language: 8 options with instant switch — English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, עברית, Polski, 简体中文 (Hebrew flips to right-to-left). Appearance: System / Light / Dark, applied instantly.

关于（App）About (the app)

「我的 → 关于」：App 版本、「版本更新」（检查 App Store 新版本）、「给我们评分」、「隐私政策」「服务条款」。

"Me → About": app version, "Check for updates" (App Store), "Rate us", "Privacy policy", "Terms of service".

「版本更新」检查的是 App 自身的商店版本，与充电桩「固件更新」（第 11 章）是两回事。
"Check for updates" checks the app's store version — unrelated to charger firmware updates (Ch. 11).

第 13 章Chapter 13

获取帮助Getting help

  • 帮助中心：「我的 → 帮助中心」，应用内打开，自动匹配当前 App 语言。覆盖配对、连接、充电、固件、账号、告警的全部排障问答。
  • 意见反馈 需登录：「我的 → 反馈」。「新建反馈」填标题与描述，可关联某台充电桩；「诊断信息」开关默认开启，自动附上 App 版本、系统、设备型号、固件版本等信息帮助定位（提交前可预览）。工单状态：待处理 / 处理中 / 已解决 / 已关闭，进入工单可与客服气泡对话。
  • Help center: "Me → Help center", opens in-app in the app's current language. Covers pairing, connectivity, charging, firmware, account and alarms.
  • Feedback Sign-in: "Me → Feedback". Create a ticket with title and description, optionally linked to a charger; the diagnostics toggle (on by default) attaches app version, OS, device model, firmware version etc. (previewable). Ticket states: Pending / In progress / Resolved / Closed; chat with support inside the ticket.

附录 BAppendix B

设备状态与提示速查States & prompts quick reference

实时页状态流：未连接充电枪 → 就绪 → 充电中 ⇄ 充电已被充电桩暂停 / 车辆已暂停 → 已完成；预约存在时另有「等待中」。

Now-page state flow: NO CABLE CONNECTED → READY → Charging ⇄ Charging paused by the charger / VEHICLE PAUSED → COMPLETE; with a schedule armed, WAITING.

在线判定：蓝牙近场或云端远程任一可达即「在线」。显示「离线」时按顺序排查：手机蓝牙是否打开 → 充电桩是否通电 → 家庭网络是否正常。

Online: either channel reachable = "Online". When "Offline", check in order: phone Bluetooth on → charger powered → home network up.

「无法确认」：命令确认超时，不代表操作失败，请勿反复重试，设备响应后界面会自动更新。

"Couldn't confirm": a confirmation timeout, not a failure — don't retry repeatedly; the screen updates when the device responds.

告警通知（消息中心，红 = 严重 / 琥珀 = 警告）：漏电保护动作、输出电流超限、温度保护、充电信号故障、急停触发、电网电压过高、电网电压过低、枪锁故障、计量异常、充电桩已离线。含义与处理见帮助中心「告警说明」；恢复后会收到「已恢复」通知。

Alarm notifications (message center; red = critical / amber = warning): Ground fault protection, Output overcurrent, Thermal protection, Charging signal fault, Emergency stop, Grid overvoltage, Grid undervoltage, Connector lock fault, Metering fault, Charger went offline. Details in Help center "Alarms"; recovery arrives as "Resolved:".

本手册以 App 界面实际文案为准编写（简体中文语言包 2026-07-16 版）· 功能以实际发布版本为准 · 权威源：docs/user-manual/ Written against the app's actual interface text (language packs, 2026-07-16) · Features subject to the released version · Source of truth: docs/user-manual/
